title: [RELEASED] API for predefining values for columns like Status/Dropdown
excerpt:
Hi, 
After creating new columns on the board like Status or Dropdown, I would like to predefine some labels /options for these columns. I.e: in case of Status column I would to define some set of labels and link them wit…

posts.author: Richard (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
After creating new columns on the board like Status or Dropdown, I would like to predefine some labels /options for these columns. I.e: in case of Status column I would to define some set of labels and link them with colors.
Is this possible vi graphQL API?

Regards.
Richard

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Richard,

welocme to the community

Check out this thread.

API - How to update the status of an Item monday Apps & Developers
Hi I’ve been looking over the GraphQL API for a while now and have been trying to find a way to update the status of an item. Can anyone point me in the right direction on how to update column values please? Thanks Scott

Greetings

posts.author: Richard (Richard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TMNXT-Dev

This is not exactly what I want to achieve. I want to modify the “metadata” of the column Status, without providing item id (I want to modify that what comes in “settings_str” for the Status column).

Regards
Richard

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Richard

Unfortunately that i snot supported by the API yet. You can set a status to an existing value through the API, but you can’t add/delete/modify status values.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Richard - welcome to the community!

As Bas mentioned - this isn’t currently supported via the API. You can create these values on the UI and then change the status to one of those values using the API.

This is something we’re hoping to support in the future.

-Daniel

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for jumping in guys

posts.author: Jarrod_Stubbs (Jarrod Stubbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dsilva,

Any update on this (even a proposed date for this to be added)?
We are trying to create standardised boards for users from our organisation and this not being part of the api is preventing us from doing this.
Manually setting up everyone’s boards would be quite painful
I would have thought that the status/dropdown columns would be two of the most used columns and that this would be a high priority to be added to the api.

Regards,
Jarrod

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jarrod_Stubbs,

Check out the announcement I just made about the ability to create new Status/Dropdown labels if they don’t already exist here.

Might be what you’ve been waiting for!

posts.author: Jarrod_Stubbs (Jarrod Stubbs)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Helen, this has come too late for us but I am glad that other people will have the option to standardise their boards via the api

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
